textByHash.005563884fa25a2e050fbe4c15c9d5e36dab50d0: Those curtains are not going to be in any way opulent, matey.
textByHash.0d69901124e296070dfa38163094a3d44686e222: Oh, and you were so close!
textByHash.1b33fb2154868a4e2d9a00e684ed2f1710643d8d: One? How do you suppose to use a single nail?
textByHash.1b93b75c99fa4bae8a7104ffe303cc09f62c2f17: That's it! You seem to know your stuff. I got a spare helmet from a builder that died on... I mean, err, had to leave the job for greener pastures.
textByHash.26de1a295e2d98dca3ad8159572718926bb9bf87: Erm, no, that's just, erm, paint. Yes, paint! That's what it is!
textByHash.4e2a93ede06333c2947d8e9f7f02edf8a5c514da: Of course, because that's what everyone needs - a rug up at their window.
textByHash.57dc126e3abfe430830acbfd463b30d1bdf29387: Bingo! Okay, now what takes 3 planks, 3 cloths and 3 nails to make, and helps remove light from a room?
textByHash.7c398f0298ac2a86ee802b7a4d843445602c79f5: One? How do you suppose you'd use a single nail?
textByHash.7e1846ea1e121d12bc15d7f4a3c854cdef6ccc41: How many nails does it take to make a rocking chair?
textByHash.8c1e923e96dcf4326ba1cd9ab7d4cf8bdff11676: Always glad to help a budding builder.
textByHash.8ed1532a64674db9c2fd22b93d9034b6306698a9: You'll find a kettle in the box to the-
textByHash.99b6f9b7de1ef0a19e5df5973ced9f88f621c3a3: But first, prove your Construction knowledge by answering some questions.
textByHash.a556e57c82031632aa4fa47f5953d79bedc1990a: Ah, we be building this 'ere tower. Lookin' good ain't it?
textByHash.d16bd024a2bbe2f15efbd7da5cabe318d146235d: Nice one. Last question: I like fish and I want to put some in my garden, but I need a special water feature. What materials would I require?
textByHash.d20c2912dfbc40ef885ccb18b017dcaa86abf1cd: Always glad to help a budding builder. But first, prove your Construction knowledge by answering some questions.
textByHash.f2869dbc6909b35b4617e633a3b22cd1af6f10eb: Yes - just as nice as the one you're carrying I'd say.
textByHash.f7dccfa444d5abe2343709e25354df56097742a8: Thank you - just as nice as the one in your bank!
textByHash.f95b2270f0def67cefd7324050e3d8fa69916ba2: Why, thanks. Some would say as nice as the one you're wearing!
